src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/web.xml.general_idea: Update web.xml namespace and schema location from Java EE (javax) to Jakarta EE (jakarta) to align with Spring Boot 3.x requirements.
src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/web.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x runs on Jakarta EE 9+; using the old javax namespace causes deployment failures or class loading errors because the container expects jakarta.servlet packages.
